name: think-it-through
description: A toolkit for brainstorming and developing ideas with AI through repeatable controls for long, branching conversations.

interface.shortDescription: Think out loud. Keep the threads connected.
interface.longDescription: A toolkit for developing complex ideas with AI. Use lightweight, repeatable controls to clarify thoughts, reconnect earlier branches, challenge directions, and preserve results across long conversations.
defaultPrompt: $think-it-through:think-it-through Adopt this conversation and help me think it through.
$think-it-through:think-recap Recover the full shape of this conversation.
$think-it-through:think-to-brief Turn this thinking into a reusable brief.
